we want to give you the best tools, lots of compute, and watch you do the magic.

people_highlights.name: François Chollet
people_highlights.post: One of the most jarring things about current AI is its lack of introspection ability and metacognition. It doesn't know what it doesn't know, how it knows, or how it could find out. It's a one-way system.
people_highlights.why: Recent post from Keras creator at Google

people_highlights.name: Ethan Mollick
people_highlights.post:
Interesting, OpenAI just released a free healthcare version of ChatGPT-5.4 for clinicians that beat specialty-matched physicians with unlimited time + web access on a benchmark of real & hard clinical tasks.

Caveat: the benchmark was designed by OpenAI, though it is fully op
